forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm near the Barossa Valley in the afternoon and evening. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly in the late afternoon.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Moderate

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the early morning. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the morning then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Sunny. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.
Moderate

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Moderate
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
No Rating

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog near the coast in the early morning. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
Patchy morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
No Rating

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the west in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting southerly in the evening.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
No Rating

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 25 km/h before turning southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
No Rating

The chance of fog in the early morning. Mostly sunny day. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening then becoming light in the late evening.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly in the late morning and afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 27.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.

Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the day then tending north to northeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower on and east of the ranges in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm on and east of the ranges in the afternoon and evening. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly in the evening.

Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.
No Rating

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly in the middle of the day then tending east to northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the day then tending east to northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.
Clear. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
No Rating

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h before dawn then tending east to southeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.
Clear. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
No Rating

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Mostly clear. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
No Rating

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Clear. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
No Rating

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 29 to 34.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Leigh Creek in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon then tending northeast to southeasterly in the evening.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northeast to southeasterly in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.
Moderate

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Sunny. Winds easterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.
